request_mainline: runtime/session truth is created or restored as `SessionHistory`
`reason.rewrite-policy` decides whether runtime should stay append-only, compact, rollback, rebuild, or block
`ReasonRewriteRuntime` is the baseline consumer that applies policy decisions before calling any `SessionHistory::stage_*` method
explicit rewrite gate methods are the only owner path that may bump `rewrite_version` and switch non-ordinary `rewrite_mode`
after successful turn startup, `SessionHistory::commit_turn_start` returns the session to ordinary-turn mode while preserving the bumped version
response_mainline: rewrite gate methods return updated session truth plus a rewrite-ledger record
persistence methods return JSON or filesystem snapshots for later reload
turn startup consumes session history state and projects rewrite metadata into planner diagnostics, not request text
error_mainline: volatile or forbidden rewrite base segments are rejected
mismatched session id between turn input and session history is rejected by `ReasonTurnEngine::start_turn`

shared_functions.purpose: validate and order stable/session-stable rewrite base segments before session truth mutates
shared_functions.why_shared: stable-prefix semantic validation must not be duplicated in orchestrator code

shared_functions.purpose: compute metadata-side cache diagnostics for rewrite ledger evidence
shared_functions.why_shared: cache-shape semantics must stay aligned between planner turns and rewrite ledger

call_table.responsibility: create session truth with validated base context and ordinary rewrite state
call_table.input_semantic: session id plus stable/session-stable base segments

call_table.responsibility: stage compaction rewrite and bump rewrite version
call_table.output_semantic: updated session truth plus rewrite ledger record

call_table.responsibility: stage rollback rewrite and bump rewrite version
call_table.input_semantic: rollback base context plus reason plus reference turn id
call_table.output_semantic: updated session truth plus rewrite ledger record

call_table.responsibility: stage resume rebuild rewrite and bump rewrite version
call_table.input_semantic: rebuilt base context plus reason plus resume source
call_table.output_semantic: updated session truth plus rewrite ledger record

call_table.responsibility: consume session rewrite state for turn startup
call_table.output_semantic: planned turn request plus provider payload

call_table.responsibility: clear one-shot non-ordinary rewrite mode after successful startup and stamp applied turn id
restore session truth from persisted JSON

sync_status: rewrite mode and rewrite version are now sourced from `SessionHistory` instead of turn-local constants
compaction, rollback, and resume rebuild each have explicit owner methods
persisted json/file round-trip is implemented for session truth baseline
direct white-box locks now cover empty rewrite reason, forbidden rewrite base segments, invalid persisted json, file IO failure on persist/load, and `ReasonTurnEngine::start_turn` session mismatch
`ReasonRewriteRuntime` now consumes `reason.rewrite-policy` decisions before calling each rewrite gate
remaining gap: final CLI/server runtime loop must supply real usage metrics and persisted recovery payloads
generated wiki must be regenerated from `docs/mainline-calls/reason.session-history.json` when this function-map truth changes
